title: Tunisian Lamb Tagine
description: A hearty and flavorful North African dish made with tender lamb and a blend of aromatic spices. Serve over couscous for a authentic experience.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in the bottom of a clay or ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for an additional minute.
Add the lamb and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the cumin, coriander, tunisian spice blend, salt, and black pepper.
Stir to combine, then add 2 cups of water.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then cover the tagine and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 1.5 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Stir in the chopped parsley and serve over couscous.
Garnish with additional parsley, if desired.
Serve hot, with crusty bread on the side.
